# kSecAttrType

**Global Variable**

A key with a value that indicates the item’s type.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrType: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] and represents the item’s type. This number is the unsigned integer representation of a four-character code (for example, ‘aTyp’).
title: kSecAttrType
